title: Your Only Move Is CRAFT
description: An experience that makes everything feel fresh but familiar!
body:
For the Your Only Move Is Hustle Discord Server.

 World Generation, Vein Mining, Decoration and Customization, Linking Chains n' Carts, QoL mods, trinkets, doohickeys, and shiny particles! 100+ mods. 

A moderaltly modified vanilla styled pack that is all over the place. Built on top of [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) <3

Works on your favorite copy of 1.20.1!
